title: Crisp Fermented Egg Wraps
description: This dish is a sugar-free-friendly fermented egg wrap that can be enjoyed as a breakfast item on lazy Sunday mornings in Uruguay.

ingredients.name: Fermentation Starter (optional)
ingredients.notes: Provides beneficial bacteria to start the fermentation process

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.amount: A few drops for frying if needed

instructions: Mix eggs and water in a mixing bowl. Add optional fermentation starter.
Cover the mixture and leave at room temperature overnight (12-24 hours).
In a small pan, heat vegetable oil until hot. Carefully pour egg mixture into the hot oil to form wraps.
Fry until golden brown on both sides or until fully cooked.
Serve warm or at room temperature with any desired toppings.
